overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The player descends stairs, crosses intersections, and walks along sidewalks past towering glass buildings with teal neon accents and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway leading to street intersection

events.description: descends concrete stairs from elevated walkway toward street level
moves from covered stairway to open intersection with emergency vehicle visible

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs toward the street intersection, observing an emergency vehicle and neon-lit buildings in the distance

notable_agents.action: person in red and white clothing crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic white emergency vehicle with flashing red lights parked across the intersection
tall skyscraper with distinctive teal neon lighting outlining its edges
wide concrete steps with metal railings descending to street level
street crosswalk marked with thick yellow parallel lines
modern street lamp emitting cyan-teal light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete walkway with stairs descending toward a nighttime urban intersection. An emergency vehicle with flashing lights is visible in the distance, and a pedestrian in red crosses the street ahead. The camera moves down the stairs toward the crosswalk, with teal-lit glass towers rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with towering glass buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at tall skyscrapers while continuing to walk across the intersection
finishes crossing the wide intersection and enters the street canyon between buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and overhead walkways

entered.detail: elevated glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings high above the street
large vertical digital advertisement displaying a helmeted figure
modern building with external glass staircase and neon pink accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection, tilting upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers with teal neon lighting and elevated walkways connecting buildings. The emergency vehicle recedes to the left as the camera enters the street canyon, passing under the shadow of massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertisements

events.description: large digital billboard temporarily fills the frame when camera looks upward

agents.ego_description: walking down the street between buildings covered in massive digital billboards and neon signage

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying a close-up face advertisement
building entrance with bright pink neon archway lighting
illuminated corporate signage for Arasaka on building facade
digital advertisement with red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: Walking down a commercial street canyon lined with massive digital billboards on both sides, including a prominent face advertisement and neon pink architectural lighting. The Arasaka corporate building becomes visible on the left as the camera moves forward, with palm trees and overhead walkways visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk in front of Arasaka corporate building

events.description: pedestrian density increases as entering busier sidewalk section near commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Arasaka building alongside other pedestrians in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking alongside the camera
group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete sidewalk with reflective wet surface
modern building with external glass elevator shaft and diagonal structural beams

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk with the Arasaka building prominent on the left, featuring illuminated corporate signage. The pedestrian density increases with several people walking in the same direction. Overhead walkways span the street above, and modern glass buildings with external staircases line the right side.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with red traffic light visible ahead
crossing the wide street at the illuminated yellow grid crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection, navigating around other pedestrians on the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing from left to right ahead of the camera

entered.detail: illuminated crosswalk with yellow grid pattern on the ground
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
modern building with diagonal glass facade and teal accent lighting
building with large digital screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing a wide intersection with an illuminated yellow grid crosswalk. The traffic light shows red as pedestrians cross the street. Modern buildings with diagonal glass facades and large digital screens line the left side, while palm trees and overhead walkways are visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated walkway down into the heart of a neon-drenched corporate district. It begins by descending concrete stairs toward a nighttime intersection where an emergency vehicle flashes in the distance and a pedestrian in red crosses the street. As the camera crosses the wide road, the view tilts upward to reveal towering teal-lit glass skyscrapers and elevated walkways before plunging into a deep street canyon dominated by massive digital billboards and neon pink accents. The scene then shifts toward the imposing Arasaka corporate building, moving along a crowded sidewalk beneath overhead bridges and past modern glass facades. Finally, the camera approaches and crosses a wide intersection marked by an illuminated yellow grid crosswalk, surrounded by diagonal glass architecture and glowing digital screens.
